function.name: kanban_search_tasks
function.description: Search and list Kanban tasks. Returns all tasks on the board by default, sorted newest first. Use assignee to filter by a specific agent, query to search by title/description, status to filter by state, and limit to control result count.

assignee.description: Filter tasks by assignee agent ID. Leave empty to return tasks from all agents.

query.description: Search query. Filters tasks by title or description (case-insensitive). A bare task ID (e.g. '211') returns the exact task if it exists.

status.description: Filter by task status. One of: todo, in-progress, done. Leave empty to return all statuses.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 20, min 1, max 100.

function.name: kanban_update_status
function.description: Update the status of a Kanban task that is assigned to this agent. Use 'in-progress' when starting work (after user approval) and 'done' when the task is complete.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to update.

function.name: kanban_add_comment
function.description: Add a progress note or comment to a Kanban task. Use this to log sub-steps, blockers, or intermediate findings while working on a task. This replaces internal task checklists — track your progress here so it is visible on the board.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to comment on.

content.description: The comment content, e.g. a progress update, sub-step result, or blocker note.

function.name: kanban_get_task
function.description: Retrieve a single Kanban task by its ID.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to retrieve.

function.name: kanban_create_task
function.description: Create a new task on the Kanban board.

priority.description: The priority of the task. One of: low, medium, high. Default is 'low'.

assignee.description: The agent ID to assign the task to (optional).

dependencies.description: Array of task IDs that this new task depends on. All referenced tasks must exist and circular dependencies are not allowed (optional).

function.name: kanban_update_task
function.description: Update a Kanban task's status, assignee, title, description, and/or priority. This is the successor to kanban_update_status. Supports updating all fields in a single call. For backward compatibility, kanban_update_status is still available.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to update.

assignee.description: The agent ID to assign the task to. Use empty string to unassign.

priority.description: New priority for the task. One of: low, medium, high.

dependencies.description: Array of task IDs to set as dependencies. Replaces all existing dependencies. Pass an empty array to clear all dependencies (optional).

function.name: kanban_delete_task
function.description: Permanently delete a task from the Kanban board. Super agents can delete directly. Regular agents require human approval before deletion.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to delete.

function.name: kanban_get_comments
function.description: Retrieve paginated comments from a Kanban task. Returns comments ordered newest first.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to retrieve comments from.

limit.description: Maximum number of comments to return. Default 10, max 100.

offset.description: Number of comments to skip (for pagination). Default 0.
